name: Marcos Amorim
tagline: Software Engineer | Backend, APIs, Cloud, CI/CD
current: building backend services and tools around the rdrt platform
about: Software engineer with 15+ years of experience building web applications, APIs, internal tools and live digital services.

My background is strongest in Python, Django, Wagtail, Django REST Framework and FastAPI. Across my roles, I have worked end to end: developing features, designing integrations, improving code quality, supporting production systems, and helping teams release changes safely and reliably.

I have experience with AWS, Azure, Docker, Kubernetes, Jenkins and GitHub Actions, as well as testing practices including unit testing, Selenium automation and QA collaboration. I enjoy solving practical engineering problems and building systems that are maintainable, reliable and effective in production.

projects.name: URL Shortener Frontend
projects.description: Angular frontend for the URL shortener platform, including authentication flows and integration with backend APIs.

projects.name: URL Shortener
projects.description: URL shortener service built with FastAPI and PostgreSQL, including redirects, tracking and API documentation.

projects.name: Auth Service
projects.description: Authentication service providing user registration, JWT login and a shared /auth/me endpoint for backend service integration.
